hero.title: Ideas that leave a system behind.
hero.description: A place for notes, prototypes, failures, decisions, architectures, and questions that continue to move after the first version is built.

spotlight.title: AI Documentation as Product Interface
spotlight.description: A technical note on documentation as interface: not a manual after the fact, but a surface where intent, limits, and next action become readable.

HeroIntroBlock.title: Ideas that become systems.
HeroIntroBlock.subtitle: Systems are read here as memory, interface, language, and cultural infrastructure.

seedBlocks.FeaturedProjectBlock: A project is treated as a living dossier: state, decisions, questions, and the residue of unfinished architecture.
seedBlocks.BuildLogBlock: Short traces from the making process before they become polished case studies.
seedBlocks.LabsTracksBlock: Research lines that keep fragments from becoming isolated artifacts.
seedBlocks.ActiveProjectsBlock: Ongoing systems, prototypes, and dossiers with visible edges.
seedBlocks.ThinkingArticlesBlock: Essays and notes for the cultural layer of technical work.
seedBlocks.ParticipationCtaBlock: A future invitation to follow the work, contribute context, or enter the conversation.
seedBlocks.NewsletterBlock: A quiet signal for progress notes, prototypes, essays, and decisions.
